KAGUYA-REMEMBER.title: Remember
KAGUYA-REMEMBER.description: Choose a card from the [gold]draw pile[/gold] and [gold]discard pile[/gold] to [gold]Remember[/gold].
STARLIT_SEA.title: Starlit Sea
STARLIT_SEA.description:
At the start of each turn, you may add 1 card from the [gold]exhaust pile[/gold] to your hand and draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Each time after the first, its cost increases by 1.
I_LOVE_MYSELF.title: I Love Myself!
I_LOVE_MYSELF.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all your Curse cards.
For each card in the [gold]exhaust pile[/gold], deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
BORING.title: Boring
BORING.description: At the end of your turn, if this card is in the [gold]discard pile[/gold], add a copy of it to the [gold]discard pile[/gold].
KAGUYA-COAX.title: Coax
KAGUYA-COAX.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Prioritize drawing Curses that are not exhausted.
HAPPY.title: Energetic
HAPPY.description: Whenever this card is drawn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
JOY.title: Joy
JOY.description: Whenever this card is drawn, draw 2 cards.
LOST_SOUL.title: Dote
LOST_SOUL.description: Whenever this card is drawn, [gold]exhaust[/gold] a card from your [gold]hand[/gold].
PRIDE.title: Pride
PRIDE.description: Whenever this card is drawn, gain 15 [gold]Gold[/gold].
RELOCATE.title: Relocate
RELOCATE.description: Whenever this card is drawn, put a card from the [gold]discard pile[/gold] on top of your draw pile.
HAPPY_SYNTHESIZER.title: Happy Synthesizer
HAPPY_SYNTHESIZER.description: Choose 1 of 3 random [gold]Emotion[/gold] cards to add to your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
WORLD_PRINCESS.title: World's Number One Princess
WORLD_PRINCESS.description:
Gain 1 [gold]Artifact[/gold].
Each time you play 8 cards in a turn, gain 3 [gold]Strength[/gold] and 3 [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
KAGUYA-EX_OTOGIBANASHI.title: Ex-Otogibanashi
KAGUYA-EX_OTOGIBANASHI.description:
[gold]Scry[/gold] 8, draw 3 cards.
Add one {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Yachiyo-Otogibanashi+[/green]|Yachiyo-Otogibanashi} to your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
YACHIYO_OTOGIBANASHI.title: Yachiyo-Otogibanashi
YACHIYO_OTOGIBANASHI.description:
Draw until your [gold]hand[/gold] is full.
For every 2 cards drawn this way, lose 1 Max HP, and choose a card in your [gold]hand[/gold] to gain 1 [gold]Replay[/gold].
Add one {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Otogibanashi+[/green]|Otogibanashi} to your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
OTOGIBANASHI.title: Otogibanashi
OTOGIBANASHI.description:
Can be played for free when the [gold]draw pile[/gold] is empty and the [gold]exhaust pile[/gold] has at least 8 cards.
Add 8 [gold]Replay[/gold] to a card in your hand.
SATISFIED.title: Satisfied
SATISFIED.description: Whenever this card is drawn, gain [green]{RegenPower}[/green] [gold]Regeneration[/gold].
TRANSIENT_SYMPHONY.title: Transient Symphony
TRANSIENT_SYMPHONY.description:
[gold]Scry[/gold] {ScryAmount:diff()}
At the end of your turn, retain up to {MaxRetain:diff()} cards in your [gold]hand[/gold] and give them [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
REPLY.title: Reply
REPLY.description:
If the [gold]exhaust pile[/gold] has at least 8 cards, play all cards in the [gold]exhaust pile[/gold] except this one.
Otherwise, [gold]exhaust[/gold] all cards in your [gold]hand[/gold], draw that many cards, and gain that much {Energy:energyIcons()}.
RAY.title: Ray
RAY.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all cards in your [gold]hand[/gold] and draw that many cards. If at least 8 cards were exhausted this way, all cards in your [gold]hand[/gold] cost 0 this turn.
MELT.title: Melt
MELT.description: At the start of each turn, gain {IfUpgraded:show:{Energy:energyIcons()}{Energy:energyIcons()}|{Energy:energyIcons()}} and draw {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} card(s).
KAGUYA-STRIKE_IROHA.title: Strike
KAGUYA-DEFEND_IROHA.title: Defend
KAGUYA-TSUKUYOMI_NIGHT.title: Tsukuyomi Night
KAGUYA-PART_TIME_JOB.title: Part-Time Job
KAGUYA-PART_TIME_JOB.description:
If you are in [gold]Tsukuyomi[/gold], enter [gold]Reality[/gold].
Otherwise, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and 1 [gold]Overwork[/gold].
KAGUYA-SYNERGY_STRIKE.title: Synergy Strike
KAGUYA-PLAY_OVER_SLEEP.title: Play Over Sleep
KAGUYA-PLAY_OVER_SLEEP.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Add one [purple]Poor Sleep[/purple] to your draw pile.
KAGUYA-LEAVE_IT_TO_ME.title: Leave It to Me
KAGUYA-LEAVE_IT_TO_ME.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
[gold]Partner[/gold]: Return this card to your hand when played this turn.
KAGUYA-ENERGY_DRINK.title: Energy Drink
KAGUYA-ENERGY_DRINK.description:
Gain [gold]{Energy:energyIcons()}[/gold].
Gain 3 [gold]Overwork[/gold].
Can only be played in [gold]Reality[/gold].
KAGUYA-SMART_CONTACT_LENS.title: Smart Contact Lens
KAGUYA-MODEL_STUDENT.title: Model Student
KAGUYA-MODEL_STUDENT.description: At the start of each turn, add a random [gold]Skill[/gold] card to your hand, and it costs [gold]0[/gold] this turn.
KAGUYA-CLEAVE.title: Cleave
KAGUYA-CLEAVE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies twice.
KAGUYA-STAR_CHASING.title: Star Chasing
KAGUYA-STAR_CHASING.description: If in [gold]Reality[/gold], enter [gold]Tsukuyomi[/gold]; otherwise, draw {Cards:diff()} cards and exhaust 1 card from your hand.
KAGUYA-METEOR.title: Meteor
KAGUYA-METEOR.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If this card is in your [gold]exhaust pile[/gold] at the start of your turn, play it automatically.
KAGUYA-WISH_IROHA.title: Wish
KAGUYA-WISH_IROHA.description:
Gain [gold]{Gold}[/gold] Gold.
Add one [purple]Debt[/purple] to your [gold]discard pile[/gold].
KAGUYA-CROSS_GUIDE.title: Cross Guide
KAGUYA-CROSS_GUIDE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Partner[/gold]: Put this card on top of your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
KAGUYA-BLOCK_THE_DOOR.title: Block the Door
KAGUYA-RELUCTANT.title: Reluctant
KAGUYA-RELUCTANT.description:
If the enemy intends to attack, apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Gain 1 [gold]Overwork[/gold].
KAGUYA-IMPROVISATION.title: Improvisation
KAGUYA-IMPROVISATION.description:
Gain {CreationPower:diff()} [gold]Creation[/gold].
Choose a card from your [gold]draw pile[/gold] to [gold]Remember[/gold].
KAGUYA-HAPPY_END.title: Happy End
KAGUYA-HAPPY_END.description:
[gold]When this card is exhausted, return it to your hand.[/gold]
Requires at least {RequiredEnergy} energy to play. (Reduced by 1 for each card you have played this combat)
[gold]Win the combat.[/gold]
KAGUYA-TAKETORI_MONOGATARI.title: Taketori Monogatari
KAGUYA-TAKETORI_MONOGATARI.description: At the start of each turn, add a random {IfUpgraded:show:[green]upgraded[/green] [gold]Partner[/gold] card|[gold]Partner[/gold] card} to your hand, give it [gold]Ethereal[/gold], and it costs [gold]0[/gold] this turn.
KAGUYA-SUPERMARKET_SWEEP.title: Supermarket Sweep
KAGUYA-GUARD.title: Guard
KAGUYA-STARTLED.title: Startled
KAGUYA-STARTLED.description:
Gain 1 [gold]Weak[/gold].
Exhaust {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} card(s) from your discard pile.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
KAGUYA-DONE_IS_DONE.title: Done Is Done
KAGUYA-DONE_IS_DONE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy for each [gold]Overwork[/gold] you have.
KAGUYA-I_NEED_NO_GOOD_ENDING.title: I Don't Need a Good Ending
KAGUYA-I_NEED_NO_GOOD_ENDING.description:
Enter [gold]Reality[/gold].
Draw 1 card for each [gold]Overwork[/gold] you have.
KAGUYA-IROHA_MUFFIN.title: Iroha's Muffin
KAGUYA-DELICIOUS_MUFFIN.title: Delicious Muffin
KAGUYA-BANKRUPTCY.title: Bankruptcy
KAGUYA-BANKRUPTCY.description: Consume all your [gold]Gold[/gold]. For each 10 Gold consumed, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies once.
KAGUYA-LET_US_GO.title: Let's Go
KAGUYA-THREE_RULES.title: Three Rules
KAGUYA-THREE_RULES.description:
Gain [gold]{Energy:energyIcons()}[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
You cannot draw more cards or gain energy for the rest of this turn.
KAGUYA-TSUKUYOMI_FORM.title: Tsukuyomi Form
KAGUYA-TSUKUYOMI_FORM.description: At the start of each turn, exit your current stance and enter [gold]Tsukuyomi[/gold].
KAGUYA-FLUSTERED.title: Flustered
KAGUYA-SCHEDULE.title: Schedule
KAGUYA-SCHEDULE.description: At the start of each turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}, draw 1 card, and lose 1 [gold]Overwork[/gold].
KAGUYA-TERROR.title: Terror
KAGUYA-TERROR.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy is not intending to attack, apply 10 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
KAGUYA-IRO_P_FURSUIT.title: Iro P Fursuit
KAGUYA-DARE_YOU_UPLOAD.title: Dare You Upload
KAGUYA-JEALOUSY.title: Jealousy
KAGUYA-RISING_DRAGON.title: Rising Dragon
KAGUYA-RISING_DRAGON.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage X times.
[gold]Partner[/gold]: Deal X more times.
KAGUYA-FLASH_STRIKE.title: Flash Strike
KAGUYA-FLASH_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
At the start of your next turn, return this card to your [gold]hand[/gold].
KAGUYA-CHAIN_TRICK.title: Chain Trick
KAGUYA-CHAIN_TRICK.description: Deal {IfUpgraded:show:5|4} damage to ALL enemies for each card you draw this turn.
KAGUYA-HEAVY_PUNCH.title: Heavy Punch
KAGUYA-OVERDRAW_BODY.title: Overdraw Body
KAGUYA-ONLY_EACH_OTHER.title: Only Each Other
KAGUYA-ONLY_EACH_OTHER.description:
If in [gold]Tsukuyomi[/gold], enter [gold]Reality[/gold]; otherwise, enter [gold]Tsukuyomi[/gold].
[gold]Partner[/gold]: Scry {ScryAmount:diff()}.
KAGUYA-PREPARATION_FOR_PERFORMANCE.title: Preparation for Performance
KAGUYA-CANNOT_SLEEP.title: Cannot Sleep
KAGUYA-HIGH_FEVER.title: High Fever
KAGUYA-HIGH_FEVER.description: Gain 1 [gold]Overwork[/gold]. Gain {Block:diff()} Block for each [gold]Overwork[/gold] you have.
KAGUYA-AWAKEN.title: Awaken
KAGUYA-AWAKEN.description:
Exhaust 1 card, draw 1 card.
[gold]Partner[/gold]: Draw {ExtraDraw:diff()} additional card(s).
KAGUYA-ENTRY.title: Entry
KAGUYA-UNDERESTIMATED.title: Underestimated
KAGUYA-UNDERESTIMATED.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy is not intending to attack, gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
KAGUYA-LIBERATION.title: Liberation
KAGUYA-LIBERATION.description: Remove all negative effects. For each one removed, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
KAGUYA-AIR_BLADE.title: Air Blade
KAGUYA-CLASH.title: Clash
KAGUYA-CLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, deal it one more time.
KAGUYA-DEMORALIZE.title: Demoralize
KAGUYA-DEMORALIZE.description:
Gain 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Exhaust {Cards:diff()} cards from your [gold]draw pile[/gold], then draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
KAGUYA-PREPARATORY_STANCE.title: Preparatory Stance
KAGUYA-PREPARATORY_STANCE.description: Your next {Amount:diff()} Attack(s) you play will be played twice.
KAGUYA-CONCESSION.title: Concession
KAGUYA-WEAPON_SWAP.title: Weapon Swap
KAGUYA-WEAPON_SWAP.description:
Convert all your [gold]Strength[/gold] into [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Partner[/gold]: Convert all your [gold]Dexterity[/gold] into [gold]Strength[/gold].
KAGUYA-ROPE_TRAP.title: Rope Trap
KAGUYA-ROPE_TRAP.description: For each card you play this turn, apply {DebuffAmount:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and {DebuffAmount:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
KAGUYA-TERMINATION.title: Termination
KAGUYA-TERMINATION.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] or [gold]Weak[/gold] on the target.
KAGUYA-BEST_PARTNER.title: Best Partner
KAGUYA-BEST_PARTNER.description: Whenever you play a [gold]Partner[/gold] card, draw {BestPartnerPower:diff()} card(s).
KAGUYA-RESCUE.title: Rescue
KAGUYA-SURPRISE_PERFORMANCE.title: Surprise Performance
KAGUYA-SURPRISE_PERFORMANCE.description:
At the start of next turn, gain {CreationPower:diff()} [gold]Creation[/gold].
[gold]Partner[/gold]: Gain 2 [gold]Creation[/gold].
KAGUYA-PETITION.title: Petition
KAGUYA-PETITION.description: Choose a card from your [gold]exhaust pile[/gold] and add it to your hand.
KAGUYA-THIS_NIGHT_IS_ALSO_ETERNAL.title: This Night Is Also Eternal
KAGUYA-THIS_NIGHT_IS_ALSO_ETERNAL.descri:
[gold]Scry[/gold] {ScryAmount:diff()}.
Choose a card from your [gold]discard pile[/gold] to [gold]Remember[/gold].
Enter [gold]Reality[/gold] at the end of your turn.
KAGUYA-CUT_OFF.title: Cut Off
KAGUYA-CUT_OFF.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The enemy loses {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
KAGUYA-PLAY_WITH_ME.title: Play with Me
KAGUYA-YOU_ARE_TOO_YOUNG.title: You're Too Young
KAGUYA-COMPOSE.title: Compose
KAGUYA-COMPOSE.description: At the start of each turn, gain {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} [gold]Creation[/gold].
KAGUYA-BATTLE_START.title: Battle Start
KAGUYA-BATTLE_START.description: At the start of each turn, all characters gain {BattleStartPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
KAGUYA-I_DONT_UNDERSTAND.title: I Don't Understand
KAGUYA-I_DONT_UNDERSTAND.description:
Can only be played if you have at least 4 [gold]Overwork[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
KAGUYA-FAREWELL_GIFT.title: Farewell Gift
KAGUYA-FAREWELL_GIFT.description: Gain {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]8[/gold]|[gold]5[/gold]} Gold for each card in your exhaust pile.
KAGUYA-TOUGH_IT_OUT.title: Tough It Out
KAGUYA-TOUGH_IT_OUT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Add 1 [purple]Boring[/purple] to your hand.
Gain {Overwork:diff()} [gold]Overwork[/gold].
KAGUYA-CHEER_UP.title: Cheer Up
KAGUYA-CHEER_UP.description: Remove all your [gold]Overwork[/gold], gain {Block:diff()} Block for each stack removed.
KAGUYA-SEARCH_THE_WORLD.title: Search the World
KAGUYA-SEARCH_THE_WORLD.description: Add one card from your [gold]draw pile[/gold], one from your [gold]discard pile[/gold], and one from your [gold]exhaust pile[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold] and give them [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
KAGUYA-COMPUTER_ROOM.title: Computer Room
KAGUYA-COMPUTER_ROOM.description: At the start of each turn, gain 1 [gold]Overwork[/gold], draw 1 card, and exhaust 1 card from your hand.
KAGUYA-MEMORY_TRANSFER.title: Memory Transfer
KAGUYA-MEMORY_TRANSFER.description: Play all cards in your [gold]exhaust pile[/gold].
KAGUYA-REUNION.title: Reunion
KAGUYA-LIVE_PERFORMANCE.title: Live Performance
KAGUYA-LIVE_PERFORMANCE.description:
Remove all [gold]Overwork[/gold].
The [gold]Songs[/gold] you [gold]Create[/gold] are [gold]upgraded[/gold].
The first [gold]Song[/gold] each turn costs 0.
KAGUYA-SHUT_UP.title: Shut Up
KAGUYA-FUTURE_PLAN.title: Future Plan
KAGUYA-FUTURE_PLAN.description: At the start of each turn, add a random 0-cost card to your [gold]hand[/gold].
KAGUYA-KURAKAWA_HIGH_SCHOOL.title: Kurakawa High School
KAGUYA-KURAKAWA_HIGH_SCHOOL.description: The first [gold]Partner[/gold] card you play each turn costs 0.
KAGUYA-RESEARCH.title: Research
KAGUYA-RESEARCH.description: Add a card from your [gold]draw pile[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold].
KAGUYA-TELL_ME.title: Tell Me
KAGUYA-TELL_ME.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If you have at least 4 [gold]Overwork[/gold], [gold]Stun[/gold] the enemy.
KAGUYA-NEVER_ACCEPT.title: Never Accept
KAGUYA-NEVER_ACCEPT.description:
Remove all [gold]Overwork[/gold].
Shuffle all your cards back into your [gold]draw pile[/gold], then draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
KAGUYA-WORK_RELENTLESSLY.title: Work Relentlessly
KAGUYA-TSUKUYOMI_NIGHT_PLUS.title: Amaterasu
KAGUYA-TSUKUYOMI_NIGHT_PLUS.description: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Exit your current stance and enter [gold]Tsukuyomi[/gold].
KAGUYA-BACK_TO_WALL.title: Limit Release
KAGUYA-BACK_TO_WALL.description:
Double all damage you deal and Block you gain.
Gain 99 [gold]Higher Being[/gold].
[red]Die[/red] after 3 turns.
[red]Fight to the death![/red]
KAGUYA-CURTAIN_CALL.title: Curtain Call
KAGUYA-CURTAIN_CALL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
End your turn.
KAGUYA-GUARANTEE.title: Pity
KAGUYA-GUARANTEE.description: At the end of your turn, if this card is in your hand, [gold]exhaust[/gold] 1 random card.
KAGUYA-NAIL_ART.title: Nail Art
KAGUYA-NAIL_ART.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Your next Attack costs 1 less energy.
KAGUYA-YACHIYO_CUP.title: Yachiyo Cup
KAGUYA-YACHIYO_CUP.description:
Ticket to Yachiyo.
Bring to Act 2 to trigger a special event.
KAGUYA-ELEMENTAL_ARROW.title: Elemental Arrow
KAGUYA-YOU_SCREW_UP_I_DONT_CARE.title: You Screw Up, I Don't Care
KAGUYA-GOOD_ENDING.title: Good Ending
KAGUYA-DETERMINATION.title: Determination
KAGUYA-DETERMINATION.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}, draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Double the damage of your next Attack.
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_ATTACK.title: Strike
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_BLOCK.title: Block
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_MOON_LEVERAGE.title: Act Cute
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_MOON_LEVERAGE.descripti:
Consume 1 [gold]Moonlight[/gold].
Make an enemy lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_MOON_STRIKE.title: Playful
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_MOON_FINAL_STRIKE.title: Kaguya
KAGUYA-GENERATE_SUPPORT_CARD.title: Escort
KAGUYA-GENERATE_SUPPORT_CARD.description: Add 1 {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]upgraded[/gold] |}[blue]Support[/blue] card to your [gold]hand[/gold] at random.
KAGUYA-GENERATE_SUPPORT_STRIKE.title: Raid
KAGUYA-GENERATE_SUPPORT_STRIKE.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} [blue]Support Strike[/blue] to your [gold]hand[/gold].
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_MOON_BARRIER.title: Moon Torii
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_MOON_BARRIER.descriptio:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
If 2 [gold]Moonlight[/gold] are consumed, apply 2 [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_MOON_ECLIPSE.title: Disgust
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_MOON_SCAR.title: Heavy Hammer
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_MOON_SCAR.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If 1 [gold]Moonlight[/gold] is consumed, deal 1 more time.
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_MUFFIN.title: Muffin
KAGUYA-MOON_TIDE_RETURN.title: Return Flow
KAGUYA-SINGER_ALL_STRIKE.title: Spinning Strike
KAGUYA-SINGER_ALL_STRIKE.description: [purple]Song[/purple]: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {HitCount:diff()} times.
KAGUYA-SINGER_GUARD.title: Start Broadcast
KAGUYA-SINGER_GUARD.description: [purple]Song[/purple]: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. If this is the first card played this turn, gain 4 additional Block.
KAGUYA-SINGER_STRIKE.title: First Beat
KAGUYA-SINGER_STRIKE.description:
[purple]Song[/purple]: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
If there is no [purple]Song[/purple] card in the [gold]discard pile[/gold], deal 5 additional damage.
KAGUYA-SINGER_SELF_DEBUFF.title: Fruit of Victory
KAGUYA-SINGER_BULWARK.title: Watch a Movie
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_LEAP.title: Peach
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_LEAP.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block, end your turn.
At the start of next turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)} and add [blue]Leap[/blue] and [blue]Inspire[/blue] to your [gold]hand[/gold].
KAGUYA-PARRY_PARRY.title: Worry
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_MOON_DRAW.title: Moonlight Flow
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_MOON_CONCERTO.title: First Encounter
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_MOON_CONCERTO.descripti:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
If 2 [gold]Moonlight[/gold] are consumed, gain additional {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_STRIKE_AURA_CARD.title: Coordinated Ops
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_STRIKE_AURA_CARD.descript:
Add one [blue]Support Strike[/blue] to your [gold]hand[/gold].
Each time you play a Skill card this turn, add one [blue]Support Strike[/blue] to your [gold]hand[/gold].
KAGUYA-SINGER_DRAW.title: Return Performance
KAGUYA-EXHAUST_SINGER_GUARD.title: Act Spoiled
KAGUYA-EXHAUST_SINGER_GUARD.description:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Exhaust {ExhaustCount:diff()} cards.
Gain {FortunePower:diff()} [gold]Moonlight[/gold].
KAGUYA-NOTE_COMBO.title: Note Combo
KAGUYA-NOTE_COMBO.description:
[purple]Song[/purple]: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to random enemies.
Deal 1 more time for each [purple]Song[/purple] card in your [gold]exhaust pile[/gold].
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_FORTUNE_EXPEND.title: Piece of Cake
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_FORTUNE_EXPEND.descript:
Gain 1 [gold]Buffer[/gold].
At the start of next turn, if you took no unblocked damage, gain 5 [gold]Moonlight[/gold].
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_BREAK_EVIL.title: Moonfall
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_BREAK_EVIL.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each [gold]Moonlight[/gold] you have.
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_BURST.title: Celebration
KAGUYA-GROWTH.title: Growth
KAGUYA-GROWTH.description: At the end of your turn, gain 1 [gold]Moonlight[/gold].
KAGUYA-SINGER_SUPPORT_GUARD.title: Vocal Support
KAGUYA-SINGER_SUPPORT_GUARD.description:
[purple]Song[/purple]: Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Choose a [purple]Song[/purple] card in your [gold]hand[/gold] to [gold]upgrade[/gold].
KAGUYA-HOME_RUN.title: Cyclone Hammer
KAGUYA-HOME_RUN.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
For each [blue]Support Attack[/blue] played this combat, increase this card's damage by {IncreasePerSupport:diff()} permanently.
KAGUYA-RALLY_SUPPORT_CARD.title: All-Round Support
KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_FORM.title: Celestial Form
KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_FORM.description:
At the end of your turn, gain {TsukimiFormPower:diff()} [gold]Moonlight[/gold].
At the start of your turn, consume 2 [gold]Moonlight[/gold] to gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}; if [gold]Moonlight[/gold] ≥ 10, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} more.
KAGUYA-SINGER_ECHO_COPY.title: World's Number One Princess
KAGUYA-SINGER_ECHO_COPY.description: Choose a [purple]Song[/purple] card from your [gold]exhaust pile[/gold] and add 2 copies of it to your [gold]hand[/gold].
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_AURA_CARD.title: Weapon Swap
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_AURA_CARD.description:
Each time you play a [blue]Support[/blue] Attack card, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
Each time you play a [blue]Support[/blue] Skill card, gain 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
KAGUYA-ENCORE.title: Encore
KAGUYA-ENCORE.description: Add 1 stack of [gold]Replay[/gold] to all your [purple]Song[/purple] cards.
KAGUYA-HEAVENLY_RAIMENT_CARD.title: Moon Gate
KAGUYA-HEAVENLY_RAIMENT_CARD.description: Each time you consume 1 [gold]Moonlight[/gold], gain {MoonlightBlockPower:diff()} Block.
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_MOONLIGHT.title: Climax
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_MOONLIGHT.description:
Gain 1 [gold]Moonlight[/gold].
Each time you play a card this turn, gain 1 [gold]Moonlight[/gold].
KAGUYA-FULL_MOON_SWEEP_CARD.title: Wild Dance
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_STRIKE.title: Support Strike
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_BLOCK.title: Care
KAGUYA-CONCERTED.title: Moon View
KAGUYA-HEAVY_STRIKE_CARD.title: Home Run
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_TSUKIMI_BLESSING.title: Moon Blessing
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_TSUKIMI_BLESSING.descri:
Gain [gold]Moon View Stance[/gold].
If you already have [gold]Moon View Stance[/gold], gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)} and draw 2 cards.
KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_ROBE.title: Heavenly Robe
KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_ROBE.description: At the end of your turn, gain {TsukimiRobeBuff:diff()} Block for each [gold]Moonlight[/gold] you have.
KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_DRAW.title: Starlit Brilliance
KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_DRAW.description: Whenever you draw a card, gain 1 [gold]Moonlight[/gold].
KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_FRENZY.title: Starfall
KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_FRENZY.description:
Consume all [gold]Moonlight[/gold], deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Deal 1 more time for each [gold]Moonlight[/gold] consumed.
KAGUYA-GAME_LIFE.title: Playful Life
KAGUYA-GAME_LIFE.description:
When drawn, play this card automatically.
Lose {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, gain {Block:diff()} Block, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies, gain {FortunePower:diff()} [gold]Moonlight[/gold].
KAGUYA-STAR_NIGHT_FREE.title: Turn Back
KAGUYA-STAR_NIGHT_FREE.description:
Gain 2 [gold]Moonlight[/gold], draw 2 cards, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}.
If you have {FortuneThreshold:diff()} or more [gold]Moonlight[/gold] when drawing this card, you may play it for free.
KAGUYA-SINGER_CASCADE.title: Reverberation
KAGUYA-SINGER_CASCADE.description: At the end of your turn, play the last [purple]Song[/purple] card you played this turn.
KAGUYA-SINGER_RESHAPE.title: Seek Memories
KAGUYA-SINGER_RESHAPE.description:
[purple]Song[/purple]: Choose {SingerCount:diff()} cards in your [gold]hand[/gold] and transform them into [purple]Song[/purple] cards.
They cost 0 this turn.
KAGUYA-SINGER_WAIT_BLOCK.title: Wait
KAGUYA-SINGER_WAIT_BLOCK.description: [purple]Song[/purple]: Choose {Cards:diff()} [purple]Song[/purple] cards from your [gold]exhaust pile[/gold], add them to your [gold]hand[/gold] and give them [gold]Retain[/gold].
KAGUYA-SINGER_WAIT_BLOCK.selectionScreen: Choose a Song card to add to your hand
KAGUYA-SINGER_CONVERT.title: Shining Stage
KAGUYA-SINGER_CONVERT.description: At the start of each turn, add one [gold]Performance[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold].
KAGUYA-SINGER_COMBO_STRIKE.title: Curtain Falls
KAGUYA-SINGER_COMBO_STRIKE.description:
[purple]Song[/purple]: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
If there is a [purple]Song[/purple] card in the [gold]exhaust pile[/gold], play it one more time.
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_OMURICE.title: Omurice
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_OMURICE.description:
Heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
Gain Block equal to your [gold]Moonlight[/gold].
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_BIRTH.title: Birth
KAGUYA-DAILY_SONG.title: Peaceful Daily
KAGUYA-DAILY_SONG.description:
[purple]Song[/purple]: Gain {IfUpgraded:show:6|4} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
Add 1 [gold]Song[/gold] Status card to your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_VULN.title: Demoralize
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_WEAK.title: Retreat Before Fight
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_STRENGTH.title: Inspire
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_DEXTERITY.title: Leap
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_DOUBLE_STRIKE.title: Preparatory Fire
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_DOUBLE_STRIKE.description: [blue]Support[/blue]: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies 3 times.
KAGUYA-SINGER_RECYCLE.title: Live Broadcast
KAGUYA-SINGER_RECYCLE.description:
[purple]Song[/purple]: Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Shuffle all cards in your [gold]discard pile[/gold] into your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
At the start of next turn, draw {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} additional card(s).
KAGUYA-SINGER_HOLD_LINE.title: Listen
KAGUYA-SINGER_HOLD_LINE.description:
[purple]Song[/purple]: Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Add a card from your [gold]discard pile[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold].
KAGUYA-SINGER_HOLD_LINE.selectionScreenP: Choose a card to add to your [gold]hand[/gold]
KAGUYA-SINGER_FUGUE.title: Dance Steps
KAGUYA-SINGER_FUGUE.description:
[purple]Song[/purple]: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 3 times.
Each time you deal unblocked damage, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
KAGUYA-MOON_LIGHT_ARIA.title: Royal Fan
KAGUYA-MOON_LIGHT_ARIA.description:
Add 1 {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]upgraded[/gold] |}[blue]Parry[/blue] to your hand.
If 2 [gold]Moonlight[/gold] are consumed, add 1 {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]upgraded[/gold] |}[blue]Parry[/blue] to your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_MOONLIGHT_CALL.title: Victory Flag
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_MOONLIGHT_CALL.descriptio:
Consume 2 [gold]Moonlight[/gold].
Choose 1 of 3 {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]upgraded[/gold] |}[blue]Support[/blue] cards to add to your [gold]hand[/gold].
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_MOONLIGHT_CALL.selectionS: Choose a card to add to your [gold]hand[/gold]
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_OBLITERATION.title: Annihilation
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_OBLITERATION.description:
This card costs 1 less energy for each [blue]Support[/blue] card played this combat.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Kill all minions.
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_RHYTHM_CARD.title: Curtain Raiser
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_ENERGY_CHARGE.title: Golden Scale
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_CHANNELING_CARD.title: Banquet
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_CHANNELING_CARD.descripti: The first time you play an Attack card each turn, gain a [blue]Support Strike[/blue]; the first time you play a Skill card each turn, gain a [blue]Care[/blue].
KAGUYA-CONCERTED_PREPARATION.title: Yachiyo Clone
KAGUYA-SINGER_MOON_STRIKE.title: Gaze
KAGUYA-SINGER_MOON_STRIKE.description: Whenever you gain or consume [gold]Moonlight[/gold], deal {SingerMoonAoEPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_ASSEMBLE.title: Star River Dream
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_ASSEMBLE.description: Add all your {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]upgraded[/gold] |}[blue]Support[/blue] cards to your [gold]draw pile[/gold]; they cost 0 for the rest of this combat.
KAGUYA-FINAL_PERFORMANCE.title: Tricolor Streamer
KAGUYA-FINAL_PERFORMANCE.description: Play all [purple]Song[/purple] cards in your [gold]exhaust pile[/gold].
KAGUYA-SINGER_MOON_FINALE.title: Suddenly Look Back
KAGUYA-SINGER_MOON_FINALE.description:
Consume 5 [gold]Moonlight[/gold], deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]Moonlight[/gold] ≥ 15, consume 10 more [gold]Moonlight[/gold] to apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
If [gold]Moonlight[/gold] ≥ 25, consume 10 more [gold]Moonlight[/gold] to [gold]Stun[/gold] the target.
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_TSUKIMI_PURGE.title: Open Heart
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_TSUKIMI_PURGE.descripti: Consume 1000 [gold]Moon Sights[/gold], [gold]exhaust[/gold] all Curse cards, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each.
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_TSUKIMI_ULTIMATE.title: Sea of Stars
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_TSUKIMI_ULTIMATE.descri: Consume 1000 [gold]Moon Sights[/gold], gain [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Dexterity[/gold] equal to your [gold]Moonlight[/gold].
KAGUYA-FULL_MOON_STRIKE.title: Down Rush
KAGUYA-FULL_MOON_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Add 1 [blue]Wild Dance[/blue] to your [gold]hand[/gold].
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_ALLOCATION.title: Prepare
KAGUYA-MOONLIGHT_TRIPLE_STRIKE.title: Appear
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_CLEAR_GAME.title: Unbelievable
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_CLEAR_GAME.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 3 times.
You may consume up to 2 [gold]Moonlight[/gold]; each consumed stack adds 1 more hit.
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_MOONLIGHT_RECALL.title: Counterattack Start
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_MOONLIGHT_RECALL.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
If 5 [gold]Moonlight[/gold] are consumed, return this card to your [gold]hand[/gold] and reduce its cost by {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_WIN_STRIKE.title: Decisive Blow
KAGUYA-HINA_MODS_WIN_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When this card kills an enemy, gain 3 [blue]Support Strike[/blue].
KAGUYA-SINGER_COMB.title: Perfect Combo
KAGUYA-SINGER_COMB.description: [purple]Song[/purple]: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies once for each time this card has been played this combat.{InCombat:\n (Hit {CalculatedHits:diff()} times)|}
KAGUYA-LEAP_STRIKE.title: Leaping Strike
KAGUYA-LEAP_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have [gold]Moonlight[/gold], gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
KAGUYA-GRADUATION_PERFORMANCE.title: Graduation Performance
KAGUYA-GRADUATION_PERFORMANCE.descriptio:
Consume all [gold]Moonlight[/gold], remove all your [purple]Song[/purple] cards.
Draw until your [gold]hand[/gold] is full.
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_DRAW.title: Dash
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_FORGE_CARD.title: Under Fireworks
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_FORGE_CARD.description: Cards you obtain this combat are [gold]upgraded[/gold].
KAGUYA-MOONLIGHT_SLASH.title: Heaven's Will
KAGUYA-MOONLIGHT_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have played fewer than 3 cards this turn, gain {FortunePower:diff()} [gold]Moonlight[/gold].
KAGUYA-MOONLIGHT_OVERFLOW.title: Same Moon, Different Time
KAGUYA-MOONLIGHT_OVERFLOW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If your [gold]Moonlight[/gold] is 9 or more, double your [gold]Moonlight[/gold].
KAGUYA-CONFLUENCE.title: Pre-Match Prep
KAGUYA-CONFLUENCE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
While this card is in your hand, each [blue]Support Strike[/blue] you play adds its damage to this card.
This card can only be played after its damage reaches 20 this way.
KAGUYA-MOONLIGHT_RECALL.title: Accustomed to Loneliness
KAGUYA-MOONLIGHT_RECALL.description: Add 1 card from your [gold]discard pile[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]upgraded[/gold] and |}and it costs 0 this turn.
KAGUYA-MOONLIGHT_RECALL.selectionScreenP: Choose a card to add to your [gold]hand[/gold]
KAGUYA-MOONLIGHT_BARRIER.title: Another World
KAGUYA-MOONLIGHT_BARRIER.description: Gain Block equal to the total number of cards in your [gold]draw pile[/gold], [gold]discard pile[/gold], and [gold]exhaust pile[/gold].
KAGUYA-MOONLIGHT_STRIKE_CARD.title: Past
KAGUYA-MOONLIGHT_STRIKE_CARD.description: Deal damage equal to your [gold]Moonlight[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} times.
KAGUYA-MOONLIGHT_FLOW.title: Way Home
KAGUYA-MOONLIGHT_FLOW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {MoonlightGain:diff()} [gold]Moonlight[/gold].
If 4 Moonlight are consumed, return this card to your [gold]hand[/gold].
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_SURGE.title: You and Me
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_SURGE.description: Discard all cards in your [gold]hand[/gold], gain an equal number of {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]upgraded[/gold] |}[blue]Support[/blue] cards.
KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_CHOICE.title: New Beginning
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_HEAVY_BLOCK.title: Parry
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_GOLD.title: Fuju~
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_HEAL.title: Chips
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_INTANGIBLE.title: Digital Ghost
KAGUYA-SINGER.title: Song
KAGUYA-MULTI_SUPPORT_GATHER.title: Yachiyo's Aid
KAGUYA-MOONLIGHT_TEAM_BLESS.title: Gather
KAGUYA-MOONLIGHT_TEAM_BLESS.description: Whenever 3 [gold]Moonlight[/gold] are consumed, all players gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
KAGUYA-CONFUSION.title: Confusion
KAGUYA-CONFUSION.description:
When drawn, draw 2 cards.
Randomize the cost of all cards in your hand this turn.
KAGUYA-LONELINESS.title: Loneliness
KAGUYA-RELIEF.title: Incarnation
KAGUYA-RELIEF.description: When drawn, remove all your negative effects.
KAGUYA-EXPECTATION.title: Expectation
KAGUYA-EXPECTATION.description: When drawn, draw 1 card and gain 3 [gold]Moonlight[/gold].
KAGUYA-VIGOR_BURST.title: Performance
KAGUYA-VIGOR_BURST.description:
Gain 5 [gold]Vigor[/gold].
Your next Attack does not consume [gold]Vigor[/gold].
